TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Mepuwal ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 55 buwan, 177 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 165 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 89%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mepuwal hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Mepuwal hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Mepuwal hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mepuwal hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Mepuwal hya' ga Malabang. tay 'llaw na Mepuwal hya' ga Mabanan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mepuwal ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu tajaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mepuwal ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na mepuwal ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na mepuwal ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mepuwal ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na mepuwal ħjaʔ ɣa malaβaŋ. taj ʔllaw na mepuwal ħjaʔ ɣa maβanan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Mepuwal ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 55 buwan, 177 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 165 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 89%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mepuwal hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Mepuwal hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Mepuwal hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mepuwal hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Mepuwal hya' ga Malabang. tay 'llaw na Mepuwal hya' ga Mabanan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mepuwal ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu tajaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mepuwal ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na mepuwal ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na mepuwal ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mepuwal ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na mepuwal ħjaʔ ɣa malaβaŋ. taj ʔllaw na mepuwal ħjaʔ ɣa maβanan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
